audience: SME owners, marketers and communications teams preparing a corporate video or briefing a production crew
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's helpen een bedrijfsvideo om te zetten van een algemeen idee naar een helder, filmisch en uitvoerbaar script met bewijs, scènes, interviews en herbruikbare versies

searchIntent.question: How do you turn a corporate video idea into a practical script with a clear message, visual evidence, interviews and reusable versions?

mainKeyword: how to structure a corporate video script
directAnswer: A workable corporate video script starts with one viewer question, one intended next step and verifiable evidence. For each scene, specify what viewers see, hear and need to understand, then connect every important claim to a real person, process, product or result.
title: How to structure a corporate video script: from core message to shoot-ready plan
metaDescription: Learn how to structure a corporate video script around your message, evidence, scenes, interviews, call to action and a practical production plan.
h1: How to structure a corporate video script: from core message to shoot-ready plan

internalLinks.anchor: why invest in a corporate video

factsToPreserve: The script must serve the organisation, production crew and viewer
Not every SME production needs a storyboard for every shot
Consent to be recorded does not automatically cover every publication or distribution under Belgian guidance
The article is production information, not legal advice
A script supports but does not guarantee video search results or rankings
